CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Type__c) ,'Assembly Event', IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Assembly_Maintenance_Event_Invoice__c),leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c, leaseworks__Assembly_Maintenance_Event_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c ) ,'MR Payment', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c ),leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c,leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c) ,'Starting Balance',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__c),Today(),leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c) ,'MR Fund Transfer',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer__c),leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c,leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer__r.leaseworks__Date__c) ,'Manual MR Credit Note',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c),leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c,leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c),leaseworks__Assembly_MR_Info__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date_New__c)
CustomField.label: Snapshot Date
